# Bursalı Oto Servis Fethiye

Bursalı Oto Servis is a premium auto repair shop located in Fethiye, Muğla, Turkey. We specialize in luxury and German car brands including BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Porsche, Audi, and Land Rover.

## Services
- Computerized Diagnostics: We use original licensed diagnostic tools including PIWIS for Porsche and ODIS for VAG group.
- Engine and Transmission Overhaul: Specializing in automatic transmissions like Aisin, and complete engine rebuilds using 100% original OEM parts.
- 24/7 VIP Towing & Roadside Assistance: Secure, damage-free transport for luxury vehicles anytime, day or night.
- VIP Fleet Night-Shift Maintenance: Overnight repair services for tourism fleets (Vito, Crafter) to prevent operational downtime.

## Multilingual Support
We proudly serve expats and tourists. Our staff speaks:
- English
- Russian (Русский)
- Arabic (عربي)
- Ukrainian (Українська)

## Contact Information
- Address: Taşyaka Mahallesi, Yeni Sanayi Sitesi, 264. Sokak, No: 1, 48300 Fethiye/Muğla, Turkey
- Phone (İbrahim Bekiç): +90 554 881 20 21
- Landline: 0252 614 15 86
- Hours: Monday - Saturday (08:30 - 19:30)
- Website: https://bursaliotoservis.com

## Why Choose Us?
We provide "clinic-level" precision for luxury vehicles. We offer a 24/7 secure parking facility with camera surveillance, ensuring your vehicle is safe during repairs. Our repairs preserve the factory warranty of the vehicles. We do not use trial-and-error methods; we find the exact fault and fix it with guaranteed service.
